celestial_touch.title: Obtain 4 Celestial Dust (Celestisynth mod — found in End structures or crafted from End materials)

celestial_ingot_first.title: Craft your first Celestial Ingot (Celestisynth — entry-tier celestial metal)

subtitle.text: The road home is not shorter than the road out. It is the same road walked differently.

description: Celestisynth is the highest crafting tier in Sinborn Odyssey 2.
It begins with Celestial Dust — gathered from End structures or processed from End materials.
Celestial Dust → Celestial Ingot → Celestial Netherite Ingot → Celestial tools and armor
The celestial_netherite_ingot combines two peak materials:
Netherite (the hardest natural material) + Celestial (post-End synthetic material).
It is the material you bring back to the Overworld from the End.
It is what the journey made possible.
No civilization before you synthesized Celestial Netherite.
They were missing the thing you have:
everything that happened after they fell.
